input.background:
Exercise 12.3 showed data relating various factors to the occurrence of acute graft-versus-host disease (GvHD) in 37 patients having a bone marrow transplant. Backward stepwise Cox regression analysis using diagnosis, recipient's age and sex, donor's age and sex, whether the donor had been pregnant, MECLR/MLR index and GvHD to predict survival yields the following model:

Variable | Regression coefficient | Standard error
GvHD (0=No, 1=Yes) | 2.306 | 0.5898
CML (0=No, 1=Yes) | -2.508 | 0.8095
input.question: Calculate the 95% confidence interval for the hazard ratio associated with GvHD.
